untranslatable_reason: Broadening Bottom pattern requires detection of two diverging trend lines (upsloping resistance, downsloping support) and identification of higher highs and lower lows across multiple bars. The allowed indicators do not include trend line detection, pattern recognition, or multi-bar slope analysis. The pattern is inherently a visual/structural recognition task that cannot be fully expressed with the available point-in-time price and technical indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted to approximate with recent downtrend (close below SMA20), diverging price action (higher highs AND lower lows), but this fails to capture the core megaphone geometry and trend line convergence that defines the pattern. A proper implementation would require custom pattern detection logic outside the scope of these atomic indicators.
